features: Interdental cleaning: TePe Original Interdental brush is a plaque remover that allows you to safely clean between your teeth. It is also a great oral care tool for cleaning implants, crowns and bridges. Suitable for narrow gaps.

Dental plaque removal tool: The Interdental Brush from TePe helps you remove plaque and clean the remaining 40% of your teeth that a toothbrush doesn't reach. An efficient and easy way to remove plaque between teeth.
For a fresher breath: It's important to have a good oral hygiene. Use daily for healthier teeth and gum and for a fresher breath. Use together with a toothbrush in your daily oral care routine.

Renewable materials: The materials of the TePe Interdental Brush are sourced from renewable materials, with a great focus on product quality, efficiency and design. TePe Interdental Brushes are made in Sweden.

Ergonomically shaped handle: The user-friendly handle offers a stable grip which enables cleaning with controlled movements. The interdental brushes are developed in collaboration with dental experts to ensure highest quality in every detail.
description: Product Description An interdental brush is the most efficient way to remove plaque between the teeth in a user-friendly way. It's designed to clean the gaps where a regular toothbrush is unable to reach. By only using a toothbrush you clean 60% of your teeth, but by adding an interdental brush to your oral care routine, you will clean up to 100% of your teeth. The TePe Interdental Brush Original Red has a smaller brush size (ISO size 2) and a flexible neck for increased durability and access. The interdental brush, which is available in 9 different sizes, can be used for cleaning between teeth, implants, bridges, and crowns. Use daily to keep teeth and gums healthy and fresh. Directions Turn the brush slightly when inserting between the teeth. Move the brush back and forth a few times. Curve slightly for use between back teeth. Rinse the brush both during and after use. Use daily, change when worn. Never force the brush into a space. Safety Warning Attention: Do not lose sight of children. Use only for cleaning the teeth. Change the brush after 3 months or after an illness. Box Contains 1 x TePe 138230 INTERDENTAL BRUSH ORIGINAL, SIZE 2 (0.5 MM) Pack of 10x8 pcs Manufacturer Contact Information TePe Oral Hygiene Products Ltd., Eklund House, 6 Cathedral Avenue, Wells, Somerset, BA5 1FD.
